given: The stock table has rows with batch_number and serial_number (populated or NULL from unparseable codes) after S1 backfill, and S3 down migration has executed
when: We examine the stock table rows after rollback
then: Every row has a non-NULL inventory_code value
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on migration completeness across all rows (the down UPDATE statement reconstructs inventory_code for every row without skipping any), asserted by a row-count integrity probe on the paired branch. Owner: the Alembic revision (set-based UPDATE) in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: data integrity (R1), no silent data loss; every row must have the reconstructed value.

independence.rationale: AC2 tests that the column is restored; AC3 tests that reconstruction is complete and all rows have values
